description.ko: 에코-0는 복잡한 청각 주파수를 환상적인 시각적 풍경으로 변환하는 첨단 AI 코어입니다. 역동적인 빛의 패턴을 통해 음파와 디지털 예술의 교차점을 경험해 보세요.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an advanced artificial intelligence core that translates complex auditory frequencies into breathtaking visual landscapes. Experience the intersection of sound waves and digital art through dynamic light patterns.

prompt: A futuristic cybernetic core labeled ECHO-0, surrounded by holographic sound waves and vibrating equalizer patterns, neon blue and violet aesthetic, high-tech laboratory setting, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sound visualization concept art.
